title: bromus mutabilis var. commutatus
intro: Bromus mutabilis var. commutatus, also known as Brome grass or Bromegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bromus mutabilis var. commutatus include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, as well as supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
